title: DETERMINATION OF PEROXIDASE ACTIVITY USING STOP REAGENT
author: Kravchenko, E. M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
A number of substances inhibiting the activity of horseradish peroxidase have been studied. The most effective "stop reagents" are hydrochloric acid and concentrated hydrogen peroxide solution. A method for determining the activity of plant peroxidases by sampling using ortho-phenylenediamine as a reducing substrate and concentrated hydrogen peroxide solution as a stop reagent has been optimized.  
     Keywords       :            peroxidase, ABTS, spectrophotometry, photocolorimetry, ortho-phenylenediamine.
steps_raw:
